title: Bee An Apple
content:
The taste of an apple,
    the cringing of a bee
    as sun stops turning
    a ladle over their skins;
    the fire gold stains
    on apple's skin,
    the honey yellow, black bits
    a hornet wrinkles in.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Bee An Apple"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
